more.title: Schools Must Apply For Permission To Write Cambridge And Provide Justification: Education Minister
more.description: Schools Must Apply To Offer Cambridge As ZIMSEC Becomes Mandatory From 2027 Zimbabwe’s Education Minister Torerayi Moyo has declared that schools wishing to offer Cambridge examinations alongside ZIMSEC will now have to apply for permission and justify their decision, as the Government moves to enforce a single national examination system from 2027.
